title: (Bullish SIgnal) Momentum Indicator for MRNA turns positive, indicating new upward trend
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
MRNA saw its Momentum Indicator move above the 0 level on April 08, 2021. This is an indication that the stock could be shifting in to a new upward move. Traders may want to consider buying the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 30 similar instances where the indicator turned positive. In 27 of the 30 cases, the stock moved higher in the following days. The odds of a move higher are at 90%. Current price $171.05 crossed the support line at $153.88 and is trading between $222.10 resistance and $153.88 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/19/21 - 04/21/21, the price experienced a +18% Uptrend. During the week of 04/14/21 - 04/21/21, the stock enjoyed a +6% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/afeg9sk8hru61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=8656dc7bdf9ee90269e7d648a6d20bebe3ce74a8

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for MRNA just turned positive on April 06, 2021. Looking at past instances where MRNA's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 14 of 18 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

MRNA moved above its 50-day Moving Average on April 13, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for MRNA crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on April 20, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 6 of 6 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

Following a +14.8% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MRNA advanced for three days, in 129 of 147 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.
